content: You can re-enable the service at any time. Are you sure you want to continue?

comment.text: This key displays a confirmation message within a dialog or prompt, asking the user if they are sure they want to disable an AI service, while also informing them that they can re-enable it later. It appears in the Portal Settings and AI Tools pages when a user attempts to disable a service. Translators should maintain the reassuring tone suggesting reversibility.
